hero.desc: An integrated educational system combining the spirituality of study circles with professional technology. Join over 5,000 students and 250 certified teachers in a safe, motivating environment.
hero.registerBtn: Register as a Student or Parent

about.subtitle: Our Vision & Mission
about.title: Quranic Education for the Modern Era
about.desc: Wartel is the result of merging authentic Quranic education with modern technology. We aim to build a nurturing environment for the Quran, easing the journey of memorization for students away from administrative complexities.
about.value1Desc: We give special attention to each student to ensure their continuation and progress.
about.value2Desc: All our teachers are certified with high competence to ensure correct recitation.
about.value3Desc: We use the latest technologies to facilitate evaluations and attending circles.

features.subtitle: Platform Features
features.title: Designed to Serve You Smartly
features.f1Desc: A system that calculates your grades, sends Telegram notifications, and suggests a revision partner automatically.
features.f2Desc: Directly join your circles (Meet/Zoom) with one click from your dashboard.
features.f3Desc: An integrated repository of PDFs and video explanations tailored for your track.
features.f4Desc: Real-time reports and charts showing your progress in memorization and revision.
features.f5Desc: Opportunities to obtain certified Ijazah and documented certificates after passing exams.
features.f6Desc: Discover a competitive environment and enriching activities.

timeline.subtitle: Your Spiritual Journey
timeline.title: How do you start your journey?
timeline.s1Desc: Simple and quick steps to create your account via the registration portal.
timeline.s2Desc: A short interview to test memorization levels and determine Tajweed proficiency.
timeline.s3Desc: Assigning students to groups that fit their tracks and time.
timeline.s4Desc: Finishing the designated curriculum and issuing accredited certificates.

programs.subtitle: Our Specialized Programs
programs.title: Tracks for All Levels
programs.desc: Educational tracks considering individual differences and student goals, from learning letters to the highest certifications.
programs.btn: Join the suitable track for you
programs.p1Desc: Focuses on the correct pronunciation of letters and basic Tajweed theories.
programs.p2Desc: A programmed plan to memorize the entire Quran over a specific period.
programs.p3Desc: For those who completed memorization, focusing on intensive review.
programs.p4Desc: To obtain a certification linked back to the Prophet ﷺ (Ijazah).

testimonials.subtitle: What they said about us
testimonials.title: Opinions of Academy Students & Partners
testimonials.t1Text: I never imagined finding a platform this organized! Everything is automated.
testimonials.t2Text: As a parent, I am relieved by the instant access to my daughters reports. Very accurate.
testimonials.t3Text: The Tamam system revolutionized our review methods! We cooperate daily.

cta.title: Ready to start your journey?
cta.desc: Do not hesitate to join the caravan of the Quran. Seats are limited.

faq.subtitle: Common Questions
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Are the lessons paid or free?
faq.a1: The platform is completely free and fully funded through charitable support and donations.
faq.q2: Do you provide certified certificates after completing the Quran?
faq.a2: Yes, after passing the final tests, the graduate receives a certified certificate of completion.
faq.q3: Can a parent track their daughters grades from the system?
faq.a3: Absolutely, there is a dedicated parents portal for instant access to attendance and grades.
faq.q4: What is the Tamam system mentioned on the site?
faq.a4: An innovative system connecting you with a Quranic partner to recite daily revisions.
faq.supportText: Technical support is available to answer your inquiries.

footer.desc: A registered non-profit charity academy, seeking to facilitate Quran memorization and Tajweed for women and children through smart technical environment.
footer.madeBy: Programmed and designed with love to serve the Book of Allah

achievements.subtitle: A Journey of Giving & Excellence
achievements.title: Achievements of Warattel Academy
achievements.description: By the grace of Allah, and over years of blessed Quranic giving, Warattel Academy has achieved many scientific and educational achievements that contributed to preparing memorizers and masters of the Book of Allah, and spreading and facilitating the learning of Quranic sciences. These achievements are but bright models from a journey full of giving and excellence; we ask Allah to bless it and benefit the nation through it.
achievements.cohortsDesc: Graduating hundreds of memorizers and masters of the Book of Allah with Tajweed and mastery of Quranic similarities (Mutashabihat) through various tracks and according to a comprehensive plan for memorization and revision through Warattel Institute for Women and Children.
achievements.tajweedDesc: In Tajweed science, by studying the texts of Tuhfat Al-Atfal and Al-Jazariyyah, explaining their scientific chapters, with a complete file of letter articulations and characteristics. Thousands of female students participated in each course, reflecting the distinguished scientific level of the academy.
achievements.noraniaDesc: Graduating cohorts proficient in correct reading according to Al-Qaida Al-Noorania curriculum, obtaining an Ijazah at the end of the course.
achievements.grammarDesc: Specialized courses to understand the language of the Quran and parse its verses in a simplified and easy style.
achievements.ijazatQuranDesc: Granting and preparing Ijazah holders in the Holy Quran with the narration of Hafs from Asim.
achievements.ijazatMutunDesc: Accredited Ijazat in Tuhfat Al-Atfal, Al-Jazariyyah, and Al-Qaida Al-Noorania.
achievements.teachersDesc: Qualifying distinguished Quranic cadres combining scientific mastery and educational skills.
achievements.tadabburDesc: Faith-based and educational programs reinforcing connection with the Book of Allah in understanding and practice.
achievements.maqraahDesc: A distinguished recitation circle accompanied by master teachers to teach correct recitation throughout the day and apply Tajweed theories practically.
achievements.impactDesc: Years of Quranic giving that yielded thousands of beneficiaries inside and outside the academy.
achievements.freeDesc: All academy activities are completely free of charge, including certificates and Ijazat.

instructions.title: Admission Guide & Important Instructions
instructions.agreeCheckbox: I agree and commit to all the instructions and rules mentioned above
instructions.agreeTextPart1: I have read and agree to the
instructions.validationError: You must read and approve the instructions to register

women.title: Women's Section Rules and Regulations
women.subtitle: Please note that compliance with the following instructions is an essential condition for continuing study at the institute.
items: Attending the weekly memorization session with the teacher is mandatory. Missing two consecutive sessions will result in the student being removed from the session.

Attending the 'Tuhfat Al-Atfal' and 'Al-Muqaddimah Al-Jazariyyah' courses is mandatory on Sundays and Wednesdays at 8:00 PM Egypt time. Missing two consecutive sessions will lead to final dismissal from the institute.
Please note that obtaining a passing certificate is limited to those who complete the course entirely from beginning to end in accordance with the specified guidelines.
Attending all Holy Quran and Tajweed exams is mandatory for all students.

Commitment to memorization according to the Mutashabihat curriculum and daily recitation with the assigned companion. Failure to send the 'Tamam' (completion status) for three consecutive days will result in a warning. Receiving two consecutive warnings will result in the student's removal from the institute.
The student's final grade at the end of the academic year is calculated as follows: 20% for the Holy Quran, 30% for Tajweed, 50% for the final exam.
Commitment to using the same phone number in all exams and forms of the institute. Registering or testing using a different phone number will result in the results being withheld or invalidated.

Refraining from joining any other memorization groups inside or outside the institute throughout the study period, in order to maintain commitment to the educational plan and the prescribed daily portion (Wird), and to achieve maximum benefit from the academic program.

children.title: 🪷 Baraem Waratel Institute 🪷
children.subtitle:
⚠️ Important Alerts and Instructions

Based on the institute's keenness to achieve the best educational and developmental results for our children, the success of the Quranic program relies—after the success granted by Almighty Allah—on the integration of three main parties:

The Mother – The Student – The Teacher
items: 📌 Please choose a suitable track for the child's memorization ability
📌 Please choose the session time carefully to align with the child's school and other lessons, as the session time is fixed and cannot be changed
📌 Commitment to attending the Quranic session from its beginning until its end accompanied by the mother. Missing two consecutive sessions will result in the student's exclusion from the program.
📌 Ensuring the daily 'Tamam' is sent, under the mother's supervision and follow-up
✏️ Failure to send the 'Tamam' for two consecutive days will result in a warning for the student, and repeated warnings will lead to permanent exclusion from the institute
📌 Eagerness to attend Tajweed sessions to elevate the child's level
📌 Giving special care to daily revision, as it is the foundation for consolidating and mastering memorization, and is no less important than new memorization.
📌 The mother's daily follow-up and review of the student's memorization before the session is a basic requirement for the success of the educational journey.
📌 Ensuring attendance of all Holy Quran exams, as their grades represent part of the student's final assessment. Missing exams leads to final dismissal from the institute.

📌 It is recommended to play the teaching Quran (Al-Mus'haf Al-Mu'allim) for the student daily during study, play, and daily activities due to its significant impact on consolidating memorization and improving recitation.
📌 The student should allocate daily time to quickly read what has been memorized to enhance mastery and consolidate memorization.
children.closing: 🤲 We ask Almighty Allah to make our children among the people of the Quran, to bless their efforts, and to make them among the bearers of His Book who act upon it.
